game_name: Fire Emblem: Shadow Dragon and the Blade of Light

sub_pixel_system.notes: Not documented for this tactical RPG

tier_notes: Fire Emblem: Shadow Dragon and the Blade of Light is a tactical turn-based RPG, not a platformer or action game. Movement mechanics involve grid-based tactical positioning rather than real-time physics-based character movement. Unit movement ranges are class-dependent (mounted units have greater mobility, flying units greater range). No sub-pixel physics, gravity systems, or jump mechanics exist in this game paradigm. Available sources document gameplay systems, character data, unused content, and story rather than physics parameters.
sources_used: tcrf - The Cutting Room Floor Fire Emblem article
